ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "sector_number" INTEGER /* Sector number associated with the neighborhood */,
  "population_2010" INTEGER /* Population count from the year 2010 */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population count from the year 2020 */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for employment statistics entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the employment statistics apply */,
  "total_residents_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of residents aged 16+ employed in the neighborhood */,
  "jobs_construction" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in construction */,
  "jobs_manufacturing" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in manufacturing */,
  "jobs_retail_trade" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in retail trade */,
  "jobs_transportation" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in transportation, warehousing, utilities */,
  "jobs_information" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in information */,
  "jobs_finance" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in finance, insurance, real estate */,
  "jobs_professional" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in professional, scientific, and administrative services */,
  "jobs_education_health" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in education, health, and social services */,
  "jobs_arts_entertainment" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in arts, entertainment, recreation, accommodation, and food services */,
  "jobs_public_admin" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in public administration */,
  "jobs_other" REAL /* Percentage of jobs in other sectors */,
  "unemployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed residents */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate in employment */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of employed residents */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the employment statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_stats_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for job distribution entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the job distribution data applies */,
  "total_jobs" INTEGER /* Total number of jobs located in the neighborhood */,
  "jobs_construction" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in construction */,
  "jobs_manufacturing" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in manufacturing */,
  "jobs_retail_trade" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in retail trade */,
  "jobs_transportation" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in transportation, warehousing, utilities */,
  "jobs_information" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in information */,
  "jobs_finance" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in finance, insurance, real estate */,
  "jobs_professional" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in professional, scientific, and administrative services */,
  "jobs_education_health" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in education, health, and social services */,
  "jobs_arts_entertainment" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in arts, entertainment, recreation, accommodation, and food services */,
  "jobs_public_admin" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in public administration */,
  "jobs_other" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in other sectors */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary across all jobs in the neighborhood */,
  "highest_salary_sector" TEXT /* Sector with the highest average salary */,
  "employment_density" REAL /* Number of jobs per square kilometer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the job distribution data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_distribution_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, researcher, community leader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
